sentences.arabic: تَعَلُّمُ الْبَرْمَجَةِ مَهَارَةٌ مُهِمَّةٌ جِدًّا فِي الْعَصْرِ الْحَدِيثِ.
sentences.translation: Učenje programiranja je veoma važna vještina u modernom dobu.
sentences.translationEn: Learning programming is a very important skill in the modern era.

sentences.arabic: يَكْتُبُ الْمُبَرْمِجُ أَكْوَادًا خَاصَّةً لِصِنَاعَةِ مَوَاقِعِ الْوِيبِ وَالتَّطْبِيقَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Programer piše posebne kodove za izradu web stranica i aplikacija.
sentences.translationEn: The programmer writes special codes to create websites and applications.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُ لِلشَّبَابِ دِرَاسَةُ هَذِهِ الْعُلُومِ عَبْرَ الدَّوْرَاتِ التَّعْلِيمِيَّةِ الْمَجَّانِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Mladi ljudi mogu izučavati ove nauke putem besplatnih obrazovnih kurseva.
sentences.translationEn: Young people can study these sciences through free educational courses.
